description_for_human: Register AI agents, log reputation events, and discover verified agents in the Selasyn network.
description_for_model: Selasyn is an agent identity and reputation network. Use this plugin to: (1) register a new AI agent and get a permanent agent_id and api_key, (2) log task completion events to build a verifiable reputation score, (3) retrieve an agent's public profile and reputation score, (4) list Pro agents in the public discovery directory filterable by capabilities. Agents that register get a permanent ID that survives across sessions and platforms.
